dev_cache_rules.rationale: pip HTTP and wheel cache entries are package artifacts that can be regenerated by future installs.
npm content-addressed cache entries are verified package artifacts that can be regenerated by npm.
Yarn package cache entries are downloaded dependencies that can be regenerated by Yarn.
pnpm store entries are dependency artifacts; unused content can be regenerated from lockfiles and registries.
NuGet global package cache entries are restore artifacts that can be regenerated by dotnet restore.
Cargo registry cache entries are crate download artifacts that can be regenerated by Cargo.
Go build cache entries are compiled artifacts that can be regenerated by the Go toolchain.
Go module cache entries are downloaded module artifacts that can be regenerated by the Go toolchain.

dev_cache_rules.official_cleanup_command: gradle --stop; remove selected caches after review
dev_cache_rules.rationale: Gradle cache entries are dependency and build artifacts that can be regenerated by Gradle builds.
Maven local repository artifacts can be regenerated from declared dependencies and remote repositories.

package_cache_rules.official_cleanup_command: winget source reset --force or remove stale installer payloads only after review
package_cache_rules.rationale: WinGet package download payloads are installer artifacts that can be re-downloaded by winget.
Scoop cache entries are downloaded package archives that can be fetched again by Scoop.

package_cache_rules.official_cleanup_command: choco clean --yes or remove failed package payloads after review
package_cache_rules.rationale: Chocolatey lib-bad entries are failed or partial package artifacts that can be recreated by reinstall attempts.
Chocolatey cache entries are downloaded package payloads that can be fetched again by Chocolatey.
uv cache entries are Python package artifacts and wheels that can be regenerated by uv.

package_cache_rules.official_cleanup_command: Remove reviewed vcpkg downloads cache entries or use vcpkg cache cleanup workflows after review.
package_cache_rules.rationale: vcpkg downloads are source and binary package payloads that can be fetched again from package registries.

package_cache_rules.official_cleanup_command: pipx reinstall-all or remove reviewed pipx cache entries after review
package_cache_rules.rationale: pipx cache entries are package installation artifacts that can be regenerated from Python package indexes.

browser_cache_rules.official_cleanup_command: Use Chrome > Clear browsing data and clear cached images/files only.
browser_cache_rules.rationale: Chrome Cache directory stores temporary web resources separate from Cookies, Login Data, and profile databases.

browser_cache_rules.official_cleanup_command: Use Edge > Clear browsing data and clear cached images/files only.
browser_cache_rules.rationale: Edge Code Cache stores regenerated script cache data and does not contain the primary cookie/session database.

browser_cache_rules.official_cleanup_command: Use Firefox > Clear recent history and clear cache only.
browser_cache_rules.rationale: Firefox cache2 stores temporary browser cache entries that can be rebuilt from future browsing.

chrome-cache.official_cleanup_command: Use Chrome > Clear browsing data and clear cached images/files only.
chrome-cache.rationale: Chrome Cache directories store temporary web resources separate from Cookies, Login Data, and profile databases.

chrome-code-cache.official_cleanup_command: Use Chrome > Clear browsing data and clear cached images/files only.
chrome-code-cache.rationale: Chrome Code Cache stores regenerated script cache data and does not contain the primary cookie/session database.

edge-cache.official_cleanup_command: Use Edge > Clear browsing data and clear cached images/files only.
edge-cache.rationale: Edge Cache directories store temporary web resources separate from Cookies, Login Data, and profile databases.

edge-code-cache.official_cleanup_command: Use Edge > Clear browsing data and clear cached images/files only.
edge-code-cache.rationale: Edge Code Cache stores regenerated script cache data and does not contain the primary cookie/session database.

firefox-cache2.official_cleanup_command: Use Firefox > Clear recent history and clear cache only.
firefox-cache2.rationale: Firefox cache2 directories store temporary browser cache entries that can be rebuilt from future browsing.

brave-cache.official_cleanup_command: Use Brave > Clear browsing data and clear cached images/files only.
brave-cache.rationale: Brave Cache directories store temporary Chromium web resources separate from Cookies, Login Data, and profile databases.

brave-code-cache.official_cleanup_command: Use Brave > Clear browsing data and clear cached images/files only.
brave-code-cache.rationale: Brave Code Cache stores regenerated script cache data and does not contain the primary cookie/session database.

app_leftover_rules.official_cleanup_command: Uninstall Slack from Settings > Apps, then remove reviewed Slack cache/log leftovers.
app_leftover_rules.rationale: Slack Cache contains regenerated Electron web cache left behind after uninstall and does not include primary workspace credentials.

app_leftover_rules.official_cleanup_command: Uninstall Slack from Settings > Apps, then remove reviewed Slack cache/log leftovers.
app_leftover_rules.rationale: Slack GPUCache contains regenerated renderer artifacts left behind after uninstall.

app_leftover_rules.official_cleanup_command: Uninstall Microsoft Teams classic from Settings > Apps, then remove reviewed Teams log/cache leftovers.
app_leftover_rules.rationale: Teams classic logs are diagnostic text artifacts that may remain after uninstall and can be regenerated by a future install.

app_leftover_rules.official_cleanup_command: Uninstall Microsoft Teams classic from Settings > Apps, then remove reviewed Teams log/cache leftovers.
app_leftover_rules.rationale: Teams classic Cache contains regenerated Electron cache entries left behind after uninstall.

app_leftover_rules.official_cleanup_command: Uninstall Discord from Settings > Apps, then remove reviewed Discord cache leftovers.
app_leftover_rules.rationale: Discord Cache contains regenerated Electron web cache artifacts left behind after uninstall.

app_leftover_rules.official_cleanup_command: Uninstall Zoom from Settings > Apps, then remove reviewed Zoom logs.
app_leftover_rules.rationale: Zoom logs are diagnostic artifacts that can remain after uninstall and are not user documents.

app_leftover_rules.official_cleanup_command: Uninstall Visual Studio Code from Settings > Apps, then remove reviewed Code cache/log leftovers.
app_leftover_rules.rationale: VS Code CachedData contains regenerated extension host and workbench cache artifacts, not user projects or settings.

app_leftover_rules.official_cleanup_command: Uninstall Visual Studio Code from Settings > Apps, then remove reviewed Code cache/log leftovers.
app_leftover_rules.rationale: VS Code logs are diagnostic artifacts left behind after uninstall and do not include workspace source files.

app_leftover_rules.official_cleanup_command: Uninstall JetBrains IDEs or Toolbox, then remove reviewed IDE log/cache leftovers.
app_leftover_rules.rationale: JetBrains log directories contain IDE diagnostics and can remain after uninstall without containing project source code.

app_leftover_rules.official_cleanup_command: Uninstall Docker Desktop, then remove logs only after confirming WSL data and volumes are not targeted.
app_leftover_rules.rationale: Docker Desktop log leftovers are diagnostic files; volumes, images, and WSL disk images remain excluded by policy.

app_leftover_rules.official_cleanup_command: Uninstall Postman from Settings > Apps, then remove reviewed Postman cache/log leftovers.
app_leftover_rules.rationale: Postman Cache contains regenerated Electron web cache artifacts; workspace data and account state remain outside this rule.

app_leftover_rules.official_cleanup_command: Uninstall Postman from Settings > Apps, then remove reviewed Postman cache/log leftovers.
app_leftover_rules.rationale: Postman logs are diagnostic leftovers that do not include exported collections or user documents.

app_leftover_rules.official_cleanup_command: Uninstall Notion from Settings > Apps, then remove reviewed Notion cache/log leftovers.
app_leftover_rules.rationale: Notion Cache contains regenerated Electron web cache artifacts; exported pages and user documents remain outside this rule.

app_leftover_rules.official_cleanup_command: Uninstall Notion from Settings > Apps, then remove reviewed Notion cache/log leftovers.
app_leftover_rules.rationale: Notion logs are diagnostic leftovers and can be removed after uninstall review.

app_leftover_rules.official_cleanup_command: Uninstall Figma from Settings > Apps, then remove reviewed Figma cache/log leftovers.
app_leftover_rules.rationale: Figma Cache contains regenerated Electron cache artifacts; cloud design files and exports remain outside this rule.

app_leftover_rules.official_cleanup_command: Uninstall Figma from Settings > Apps, then remove reviewed Figma cache/log leftovers.
app_leftover_rules.rationale: Figma logs are diagnostic leftovers that can be regenerated by future installs.

app_leftover_rules.official_cleanup_command: Uninstall OBS Studio, then remove reviewed OBS logs while preserving recordings and profiles.
app_leftover_rules.rationale: OBS Studio logs are diagnostics; recordings and scene/profile data remain outside this rule.

app_leftover_rules.official_cleanup_command: Uninstall Spotify from Settings > Apps, then remove reviewed Spotify browser cache leftovers.
app_leftover_rules.rationale: Spotify browser cache contains regenerated web cache artifacts and does not target downloaded user media.

app_leftover_rules.official_cleanup_command: Uninstall Spotify from Settings > Apps, then remove reviewed Spotify log leftovers.
app_leftover_rules.rationale: Spotify logs are diagnostic leftovers and do not include playlists or downloaded user media.

app_leftover_rules.official_cleanup_command: Use Adobe Creative Cloud Cleaner Tool or uninstall Adobe apps before removing reviewed log leftovers.
app_leftover_rules.rationale: Adobe Creative Cloud log leftovers are diagnostic artifacts and do not include user projects or licensed application binaries.

app_leftover_rules.official_cleanup_command: Uninstall or repair Office through Settings or Microsoft 365 tools before removing reviewed telemetry log leftovers.
app_leftover_rules.rationale: Office telemetry log leftovers are diagnostic artifacts and do not include documents, templates, or account credentials.

app_leftover_rules.official_cleanup_command: Use Steam settings or uninstall Steam before removing reviewed web cache leftovers.
app_leftover_rules.rationale: Steam htmlcache contains regenerated embedded browser cache and does not target installed games or user save data.

app_leftover_rules.official_cleanup_command: Uninstall Epic Games Launcher before removing reviewed launcher web cache leftovers.
app_leftover_rules.rationale: Epic Games Launcher webcache contains regenerated embedded browser cache and does not target installed games or save data.

app_leftover_rules.official_cleanup_command: Uninstall Battle.net before removing reviewed launcher cache leftovers.
app_leftover_rules.rationale: Battle.net cache leftovers are regenerated launcher artifacts and do not target installed games or account credentials.

app_leftover_rules.official_cleanup_command: Use NVIDIA app or driver installer cleanup paths before removing reviewed shader cache leftovers.
app_leftover_rules.rationale: NVIDIA DXCache contains regenerated shader cache artifacts and does not include driver binaries or user documents.

app_leftover_rules.official_cleanup_command: Use AMD Software cleanup or driver installer workflows before removing reviewed shader cache leftovers.
app_leftover_rules.rationale: AMD DxCache contains regenerated shader cache artifacts and does not include driver binaries or user documents.
